basic_details.job_title: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Academic Assistant/Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur (IIM Kashipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur has released the official Academic Assistant/Associate Notification 2026 under Advt No. AA-03/2026 on its official website. have been announced under the IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant/Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of Postgraduate (First Class), ACA/AICWA/B.Tech/B.E./MCA (for Academic Assistant) or Ph.D. (for Academic Associate) can apply online. The application process is currently active and will close on 18 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available belo

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit preferably 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech./B.E., MCA eligible. Academic Associate: Ph.D. in relevant area.
qualification.details: Academic Assistant: Postgraduate with first class. ACA, AICWA, B. Tech., B.E., MCA eligible. Relevant experience either in academics or industry, or an M. Phil [or higher qualification] will be preferred. Academic Associate: Ph.D. in relevant area.

salary_details.details: Academic Assistant: Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month. Academic Associate: Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 39,000/- per month.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be interviewed in person or online.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kashipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Assistant/Associate positions at IIM Kashipur is 18th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Academic Assistant position, candidates must have a postgraduate degree with first-class marks. ACA, AICWA, B. Tech./B.E., or MCA qualifications are also eligible. Relevant experience or M. Phil is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: The Academic Associate position requires candidates to have a Ph.D. in a relevant area. This is a higher qualification compared to the Academic Assistant role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Academic Assistant and Academic Associate positions is preferably 35 years. No specific minimum age limit is mentioned.

faq.question: Q5. How much salary can I expect for these roles?
faq.answer: Academic Assistants can expect a salary ranging from Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month. For Academic Associates, the salary is higher, between Rs. 33,000/- and Rs. 39,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant/Associate posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications. Shortlisted candidates will then be invited for an interview, which may be conducted in person or online.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and review it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Academic Assistant/Associate positions at IIM Kashipur is contract-based, as indicated in the recruitment details.
